overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City at night. The character traverses covered walkways, crosses intersections alongside pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas, and passes under overpasses with large holographic advertisements while wet pavement reflects the vibrant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines

events.description: approaching the end of covered walkway, intersection visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing purple vending machines on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green jacket walking ahead with an umbrella

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard displaying 'SET SAIL FOR FLAVOR' with a muscular figure
illuminated purple and yellow vending machine with product displays
black metal railings separating pedestrian walkway from street level

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk beneath a massive 'SET SAIL' billboard. Purple vending machines line the left side while metal railings separate the walkway from the street. The atmosphere is damp and reflective with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with overhead pedestrian bridge visible
begins crossing the intersection alongside other pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians, navigating between people with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a blue neon-lit umbrella crossing the street
pedestrian holding a red neon-lit umbrella walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: elevated walkway structure spanning across the intersection above
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals and crosswalk indicators
painted white zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open intersection beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. The scene is dominated by neon lighting and pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas—one blue and one red—creating vibrant reflections on the wet asphalt crosswalk. The camera crosses the street with moderate foot traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian area under transit overpass with holographic ads

events.description: enters covered area beneath concrete overpass with green holographic lighting
green holographic advertisement illuminates the scene with bright emerald light

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass, passing red foliage planters and illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: massive green glowing holographic projection of a face on the building facade
heavy concrete ceiling and support columns of the transit overpass
white commercial van driving along the street to the right
planter box with red-leafed trees and plants
large screen displaying 'BATTLEFIELD' advertisement on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass dominated by a bright green holographic face advertisement. The area is sheltered from the rain with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in opposing directions. Red foliage planters and digital billboards line the left side while vehicles pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with yellow zebra crossing

events.description: exits covered overpass into open intersection with wide crosswalk
crossing wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk lines

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red illuminated umbrella crossing in the same direction
security officer or police officer standing near the crosswalk observing traffic

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black striped pattern
illuminated sign reading 'NICOLE' on the building facade
massive circular ventilation fan structure on the building exterior
abstract red neon art installation on the building wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the character enters a wide open intersection featuring a prominent yellow zebra crosswalk. The 'NICOLE' building with its large circular ventilation structure dominates the left side. The character crosses with moderate foot traffic including a pedestrian with a red glowing umbrella while a security officer stands watch on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner approaching commercial building entrance

events.description: approaching building entrance, slowing pace as reaching destination

agents.ego_description: approaching the NICOLE building entrance on the far side of the intersection

entered.detail: ground level entrance to the NICOLE building with illuminated doorway

segments.scene_description: The character completes the crossing and approaches the NICOLE building entrance on the street corner. The red neon wall sculpture is prominent on the left as the camera moves closer to the building facade. Sparse pedestrians and occasional vehicles populate the final stretch of the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban corridor that transitions from narrow covered walkways to wide, neon-drenched intersections. It begins along a damp sidewalk beneath a massive SET SAIL billboard and purple vending machines, moving steadily forward until the character emerges into an open intersection filled with pedestrians carrying glowing red and blue umbrellas. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under a concrete overpass dominated by a bright green holographic face and red foliage planters, before opening up once more into a wide intersection featuring a prominent yellow zebra crosswalk and the circular ventilation structure of the NICOLE building. Finally, the camera completes the crossing, moving past a security officer and toward the building's entrance where a red neon wall sculpture glows against the facade.
